artifact.summary: Phase 5 VALIDATE (run v2). The identity wall broke this phase: owner supplied real values (domain https://captains-fish-chicken.netlify.app, email captainsfishchicken@gmail.com, GA4 G-7W35DKNK6Z). Identity amended via the audited Phase 3 amend path, Phase 4 re-sealed with build-quality re-review, 4->5 preflight PASSED. factory validate: EXIT 0 — zero gates, zero advisories (first ship-clean validate of the engagement). Independent SEO/GEO audit of all 38 pages: PASSED with 0 blocking findings (173 JSON-LD blocks, 0 parse errors; 87/87 menu prices reconciled exactly; GA4 exactly once per page); 3 of 4 advisories fixed pre-seal (home title 74->61 chars; contact/menu/neighborhood description outliers), rebuild re-validated exit 0. Remaining advisories are deliberate (conservative Fri-Sat structured-hours omission pending owner confirmation) or launch-time (4.4 rating sync).
